title: Ruspolia decurrens
taxonomy: Ruspolia decurrens is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. It belongs to the genus Ruspolia, which is part of the Zingiberaceae family. The Zingiberaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as gingers. Ruspolia decurrens is native to tropical regions of Africa, specifically in countries such as Kenya and Tanzania. It is a type of plant that grows in the wild and is often found in moist, forested areas.
